studyName: Whole Exome Sequencing of Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia

variables.name: Age
variables.description: Participant's age

variables.name: Del11q
variables.description: Del11q is measured by FISH cytogenetic analysis of CLL tumor, and is associated with poor prognosis. Cutoff score is 5%.

variables.name: Del13qhet
variables.description: Del13qhet is measured by FISH cytogenetic analysis of CLL tumor. Del13qhet is chromosome 13q deletion in one allele. Cutoff score is 7%. Del13q is the most common chromosomal abnormalities in CLL and is associated with  better prognosis.

variables.name: Del13qhomo
variables.description: Del13qhomo is measured by FISH cytogenetic analysis of CLL tumor.  Del13qhomo is deletion of the 13q region in two alleles. Cutoff score is 7%. Del13q is the most common chromosomal abnormalities in CLL and is associated with  better prognosis.

variables.name: Del17p
variables.description: Del17p is measured by FISH cytogenetic analysis of CLL tumor. The deleted region includes TP53, and is associated with poor prognosis. Cutoff score is 8%.

variables.name: Gender
variables.description: Participant's gender as Male or Female

variables.name: IGHV
variables.description: IGHV is mutation status  of the immunoglobulin heavy chain variable region. When the DNA sequence homology  of CLL tumor is less than 98% compared to reference, it is designated as "mutated". Homology >98% is considered "unmutated."  IGHV mutation status is a CLL prognosis marker; IGHV mutated status is associated with good prognosis.

variables.name: Primary Disease
variables.description: The main disease(s) for which the participant has been asked to donate a sample for study

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Unique Participant Identifier

variables.name: Trisomy 12
variables.description: Trisomy 12 is measured by FISH cytogenetic analysis. Cutoff score is 2%. Trisomy 12 is a neutral prognosis marker.

variables.name: ZAP70
variables.description: ZAP70 is CLL prognosis marker and  positive expression is associated with poor prognosis. ZAP70 expression level is measured by flow cytometry and the cutoff score is 24%.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJID
variables.description: Subject Identifier in New England Journal Reference

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJID2
variables.description: Subject Identifier in Cell paper

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJ_SOURCE
variables.description: New England Journal Reference: Wang L., Lawrence M.S., Wan Y., et al. N Engl J Med 2011; 365: 2497-2506, PMID: 22150006S

variables.name: SUBJ_SOURCE_2
variables.description: Cell Paper Reference: Landau D.A., Carter S.L., Stojanov P., et al., Cell. 2013 Feb 14; 152(4): 714-26, PMID: 23415222

variables.name: ANALYTE_Type
variables.description: Molecular analyte

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: Sample Type
variables.description: Indicates the Tumor / Normal status of a sample

variables.name: Tumor Type
variables.description: Indicates primary or recurrent tumor

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Data type to be submitted. Array_SNP: SNP genotypes obtained using standard or custom microarrays; Seq_DNA_Methylation: Methylome sequencing; Seq_DNA_SNP_MAF_Sum: Samples were used to generate aggregate mutation annotation file (.maf); Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing; Seq_DNA_WholeGenome: Whole genome sequencing; Seq_RNA: Whole transcriptome sequencing

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID
